news.title: Federal Signal's Fantastic Growth Still Doesn't Justify Upside
news.text: Federal Signal Corporation (FSS) delivered robust revenue and profit growth, driven by acquisitions and strong demand across its segments. FSS's Environmental Solutions Group led expansion, with significant contributions from the New Way acquisition and aftermarket offerings. Despite operational strength and record backlog, FSS trades at fair to premium valuations versus peers, limiting upside.
